intro:
With a cheerful smile and endless punches, blast your way forward!
A 2D action game that's easy for anyone to enjoy!
description:
P-PAN is a simple, pick-up-and-play 2D action game.
Falling off platforms? No worries, you can fly anytime you want!
Punch enemies, collect loot, and unleash special moves whenever you like.
Find your rhythm and push onward!

-STORY-
P-PAN lives peacefully on Panchu Island.
 But one day, a mysterious giant robot suddenly appears and steals everything from P-PAN's home.
With nothing left to lose, P-PAN sets out on an adventure to restore his home.

***
P-PAN's special skill is a bright smile, oh, and punches that fly endlessly.
 Whether walking or soaring through the air, fire off rapid punches and have a blast!

● Collect "P Points" from enemies to unleash two awesome Special Moves!
The P Crash and P Cannon can both wipe out tons of enemies at once - perfect for getting out of tight spots!

● Defeat bosses within the target time to earn prizes!
Open these prize boxes to build up the Collection.
 Collect them all and restore P-PAN's home!

● Colorful pixel-art maps, original music, and a variety of stages to enjoy even in short bursts!
Each stage and boss has its own unique music, with boss battles really cranking up the excitement!

Now go punch your way to 100% completion!

The "Pixel Game Maker Series" is a series of games created using the action game creation software "Pixel Game Maker MV" that can be enjoyed on the Nintendo Switch™.
